import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    let bopt = string.byte_at(s, i)
    match bopt
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if has
          if neg
            result = list.push(result, 0 - cur)
          else
            result = list.push(result, cur)
          end
          cur = 0
          has = false
          neg = false
        end
      else if b == 45 and not has
        neg = true
      else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        has = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, 0 - cur)
    else
      result = list.push(result, cur)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let xopt = xs.get(i)
    match xopt
    when Some(x)
      if not inserted and v < x
        result = list.push(result, v)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, x)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  result
end

fn read_one() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_one()
let line2 = read_one()
let a = parse_line(line1)
let b = parse_line(line2)

mut result: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < a.len()
  let xopt = a.get(i)
  match xopt
  when Some(x)
    if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(result, x)
      result = insert_sorted(result, x)
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if result.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut s = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < result.len()
    let yopt = result.get(j)
    match yopt
    when Some(y)
      if j == 0
        s = "#{y}"
      else
        s = "#{s} #{y}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(s)
end
